form.formComment: Went down narrowly in a Restricted WIN H at Warragul latest when a half a length second but did record a quick 25.88 over the 460m journey. Looms as the one to beat this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Went down narrowly in a Restricted WIN H at Warragul latest when a half a length second but did record a quick 25.88 over the 460m journey. Looms as the one to beat this time.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last on March 30 over 595m at Sandown behind Tiger Rocks beaten 9 lengths (35.27) in a Restricted WIN. Had been in strong form, hitting the frame two times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished last on March 30 over 595m at Sandown behind Tiger Rocks beaten 9 lengths (35.27) in a Restricted WIN. Had been in strong form, hitting the frame two times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Warragul to win by 3.5 lengths in 26.33, beating Stream It. Last start finished 7th in a Mix 6/7 on April 6 over 515m at Sandown behind Lush Hour beaten 19 lengths (30.96). Has ability and looks a winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Surprised two starts back at Warragul to win by 3.5 lengths in 26.33, beating Stream It. Last start finished 7th in a Mix 6/7 on April 6 over 515m at Sandown behind Lush Hour beaten 19 lengths (30.96). Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Sandown over 515m in 29.98. Followed that up with a minor placing over 515m at Sandown at T3 RSTW six days ago. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Sandown over 515m in 29.98. Followed that up with a minor placing over 515m at Sandown at T3 RSTW six days ago. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Showed good early speed on debut. Won by 0.8 lengths at this track (28.95) beating Nicky's Galaxy in a Maiden on April 5. Will find this much tougher but she's got good box manners and speed. Back in top order and looks the one to beat.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (35.57) when sixth over 595m at Sandown in a Restricted WIN. Starts from box 6 for the first time here. Can feature with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (35.57) when sixth over 595m at Sandown in a Restricted WIN. Starts from box 6 for the first time here. Can feature with the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with lid at box rise and slow to begin.
Turned head inwards in home straight.

form.formComment: Having his first run at this track and trip. Last start finished sixth at Bendigo over 425m in (24.70). Worth serious consideration.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Sandown over 595m. Happy to risk this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Shifted out on home turn and collided.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 595m at Sandown. Will not find this easy. Not keen.
